description: Master router for dynamic NLU/NLP-based context loading

autonomy.purpose: Execution bands, user controls, meta-cognitive monitoring

constitutional.purpose: Constitutional roles (Chief Justice, PM, IAS, Shadow Cabinet)

constitutional_index.purpose: Index of all 42 constitutional articles with lazy loading strategy

constitutional_metadata.purpose: Lightweight metadata catalog for semantic injection (Claude Skills)

core.purpose: Operational loop, core workflows, execution patterns

governance.purpose: Tri-branch authority, parliamentary processes, consensus rules

memory_bank.purpose: 8-schema system architecture and atomic update protocols

parliamentary.purpose: Parliamentary structure, debate protocols, consensus calculation

rl_feedback.purpose: PPO+GAE reinforcement learning system and scoring

session.purpose: Session management, state recovery, continuity protocols

skills.purpose: Capability matrix, skill definitions, autonomous operations

violations.purpose: Violation tracking, penalty enforcement, remediation protocols

workflows.purpose: 8 JSON workflows (auto-init, bootstrap, continue, fix, next, research, update, validate)

project_status.purpose: Project status queries, migration progress, memory-bank state assessment

nlu_routing.description: User queries analyzed via NLU/NLP to route to relevant routers, articles, and workflows
nlu_routing.routing_pattern: User Query → NLU Analysis → context-router.json → Route to specific routers/articles/workflows
nlu_routing.lazy_loading: Query ONLY needed routers per task via @mcp:json-jq
nlu_routing.priority: Load constitutional articles on-demand based on semantic triggers
